cases.prompt: Marina del Rey Harbor entrance, CA
cases.center_description: entrance of Marina del Rey Harbor where it meets Santa Monica Bay
cases.label: Entrance to Marina del Rey Harbor at Santa Monica Bay, California
cases.reason: Resolved directly from geographic knowledge of the well-known harbor entrance between the north and south jetties at Marina del Rey. The practical DEM center is the harbor mouth where it opens to Santa Monica Bay.

cases.center_description: harbor entrance where Santa Cruz Harbor opens to Monterey Bay
cases.label: Santa Cruz Harbor entrance, where the harbor opens to Monterey Bay, California, USA
cases.reason: The request names a specific well-known coastal feature and a precise target subfeature: the harbor mouth/entrance to Monterey Bay at Santa Cruz Harbor. A practical DEM center is the entrance channel between the jetties at approximately 36.9512 N, 122.0013 W.

cases.center_description: entrance of Oceanside Harbor where the harbor meets the ocean
cases.label: Entrance to Oceanside Harbor at the ocean, Oceanside, California, USA
cases.reason: The request specifies the harbor entrance where Oceanside Harbor meets the Pacific Ocean. This is a well-known inlet at the mouth of Oceanside Harbor, just north of the San Luis Rey River mouth and adjacent to the harbor jetties. A practical DEM center for a 2 km by 2 km coastal domain is the inlet center between the jetties.

cases.center_description: harbor entrance channel between Morro Rock and the breakwater
cases.label: Morro Bay Harbor entrance channel between Morro Rock and the north breakwater, California
cases.reason: Resolved from well-known local geography. The requested target is the harbor entrance channel at Morro Bay, specifically the gap between Morro Rock and the detached breakwater. A practical DEM center for a 2 km by 2 km coastal domain is the middle of that entrance channel.

cases.prompt: Mission Bay entrance, San Diego, CA
cases.center_description: Mission Bay entrance channel where Mission Bay opens to the Pacific Ocean
cases.label: Mission Bay entrance channel, San Diego, California
cases.reason: The request clearly identifies the jettied inlet where Mission Bay connects to the Pacific at the west end of Mission Bay, between Mission Beach and Ocean Beach. A practical DEM center is the middle of the entrance channel near the jetty gap.

cases.center_description: entrance of Newport Harbor between the jetties at the ocean
cases.label: Newport Harbor entrance between the west and east jetties, Newport Beach, California, USA
cases.reason: The request identifies a specific, well-known coastal feature: the ocean entrance to Newport Harbor at Newport Beach. A practical DEM center is the midpoint of the channel between the harbor jetties at the Balboa Peninsula entrance.

cases.center_description: entrance of Brookings Harbor where the harbor opens to the Pacific Ocean
cases.label: Harbor entrance at Brookings Harbor (Port of Brookings Harbor), Oregon
cases.reason: The request specifies the harbor mouth where Brookings Harbor opens to the Pacific. This corresponds to the entrance between the jetties at the Port of Brookings Harbor in Brookings, Oregon, centered approximately at 42.052 N, 124.295 W. This is a practical DEM center for a 2 km coastal domain focused on the entrance channel and adjacent shoreline.

cases.center_description: Yaquina Bay entrance between the jetties where it meets the Pacific Ocean
cases.label: Yaquina Bay entrance between the north and south jetties, Newport, Oregon, USA
cases.reason: The request clearly identifies a well-known coastal feature: the mouth of Yaquina Bay at Newport, specifically the inlet between the entrance jetties where the bay meets the Pacific. A practical DEM center is the midpoint of the navigational entrance channel between the jetties.

cases.center_description: entrance of Coos Bay at the Pacific Ocean between the jetties
cases.label: Entrance to Coos Bay between the north and south jetties, Oregon
cases.reason: The request specifies a well-known coastal feature: the Coos Bay bar/entrance at the Pacific Ocean between the jetties near Charleston, Oregon. A practical DEM center is the midpoint of the inlet throat between the jetties.

cases.center_description: mouth of New River Inlet where it enters the Atlantic Ocean
cases.label: Mouth of New River Inlet, where it enters the Atlantic Ocean, North Carolina
cases.reason: New River Inlet is a well-known inlet on the Onslow Bay coast of North Carolina between Topsail Island and Onslow Beach/Camp Lejeune. The requested target is specifically the ocean mouth, so a practical DEM center is the inlet entrance on the Atlantic side rather than an interior waterway point. A center near 34.53 N, 77.31 W is an appropriate high-confidence placement for a 2 km by 2 km coastal DEM domain.

cases.center_description: shoreline at the USACE Field Research Facility research pier in Duck
cases.label: USACE Field Research Facility research pier shoreline, Duck, North Carolina, USA
cases.reason: The request identifies a specific, well-known coastal facility and target feature: the shoreline at the USACE Field Research Facility pier in Duck on North Carolina's Outer Banks. A practical DEM center is the beach/shoreline immediately landward of the FRF pier, approximately at 36.183 N, 75.746 W.

cases.prompt: Government Cut ocean entrance, Miami FL
cases.center_description: ocean entrance of Government Cut by South Beach where it meets the Atlantic
cases.label: Ocean entrance of Government Cut at South Beach, Miami Beach, Florida
cases.reason: Government Cut is the main shipping channel entrance at the south end of Miami Beach. The requested target is specifically the Atlantic-side ocean entrance by South Beach, not the channel midpoint or PortMiami side. A practical DEM center is the seaward mouth of the cut between the South Pointe/South Beach side and Fisher Island jetty.

cases.center_description: Clearwater Pass inlet where it meets the Gulf of Mexico
cases.label: Clearwater Pass inlet mouth, Clearwater Beach, Florida, USA
cases.reason: Resolved from geographic knowledge of Clearwater Pass as the tidal inlet between Clearwater Beach and Sand Key at the Gulf entrance near Clearwater Beach. The requested target is the inlet where it meets the Gulf of Mexico, so the practical DEM center is placed at the pass mouth rather than inland Clearwater or the broader pass waterway.

cases.center_description: Galveston harbor entrance between the jetties where the ship channel meets the Gulf
cases.label: Galveston Harbor entrance between the north and south jetties at Bolivar Roads, where the Galveston Ship Channel meets the Gulf of Mexico
cases.reason: The request clearly identifies the Galveston Harbor entrance at Bolivar Roads, the well-known pass between the Galveston and Bolivar jetties. A practical DEM center for a 2 km by 2 km coastal domain is the midpoint of the jetty entrance where the ship channel exits to the Gulf.

cases.prompt: Port Aransas ship channel entrance, TX
cases.center_description: Port Aransas ship channel entrance at Aransas Pass where it meets the Gulf of Mexico
cases.label: Port Aransas ship channel entrance at Aransas Pass, Gulf of Mexico side
cases.reason: Resolved directly from the user's description and general geographic knowledge. The requested target is the well-known inlet/jetty entrance where the Corpus Christi/Port Aransas ship channel meets the Gulf between St. Joseph Island and Mustang Island. A practical DEM center for a 2 km by 2 km coastal domain is near the middle of the entrance throat just seaward of the jetties.

cases.center_description: entrance of Pearl Harbor where the harbor meets the ocean
cases.label: Entrance to Pearl Harbor at the mouth between Fort Kamehameha and Iroquois Point, Oahu, Hawaii
cases.reason: The request specifies the entrance where Pearl Harbor meets the ocean, which is the well-known harbor mouth/entrance channel on the south coast of Oahu. A practical DEM center for a 2 km by 2 km coastal domain is the middle of the entrance channel between Fort Kamehameha and Iroquois Point.

cases.location: Ala Wai Boat Harbor, Honolulu, Hawaii
cases.center_description: entrance of Ala Wai Boat Harbor where it opens to the ocean
cases.label: Ala Wai Boat Harbor entrance, Honolulu, Hawaii
cases.reason: The request specifies the entrance of Ala Wai Boat Harbor where it opens to the Pacific Ocean. This is a well-known harbor entrance on the Waikiki shoreline, just west of Ala Moana and south of Waikiki. A practical DEM center is the harbor mouth between the breakwaters at approximately 21.2784 N, 157.8410 W.
